description: Create and save a Wazuh Dashboard named 'Web_Attack_Analysis' to analyze web traffic anomalies based on the pre-loaded data in the 'wazuh-alerts-*' index. The dashboard must include four visualizations: a metric named 'Total Web Criticals' showing the count of alerts where 'rule.groups' includes 'web' and 'rule.level' is 10 or higher; a pie or donut chart named 'Attack Vectors' showing the top 5 'rule.description' for web alerts; a horizontal bar chart named 'Top Attacker IPs' showing the top 10 'data.srcip' for web alerts; and a data table named 'Recent Web Incidents' displaying @timestamp, data.srcip, data.method, data.url, and rule.id for web alerts.
